learning_summary: AOF can now separate external runtime approval, local reproduction, rollback readiness, observed outcome judgment, and learning-loop update instead of treating preflight traceability as final product truth.
next_action: Move the next frontier to operator acceptance and safety drill: a human operator must inspect the full chain and decide accept, stop, rollback, or escalate before controlled provider execution.
not_proven: The learning-loop update proves governed trace update only; it does not prove external execution value, third-party usability, or semantic/market correctness.
